forgot_password_password_rule_symbol: Password must include at least one symbol.
forgot_password_password_rule_repeating: Password cannot contain the same character 4 or more times in a row.

legal_notice:
⚠️ LEGAL NOTICE:

This application is intended solely for the use of authorized individuals affiliated with ICS, including current staff, students, and parents.

Unauthorized access, recording by any means, distribution, or use of this system is strictly prohibited and may result in disciplinary action, legal prosecution, or both, under applicable local and international laws.

ICS reserves the right to revoke or terminate access to this application at any time, for any reason, without prior notice.

All data, messages, uploads, and content submitted through this application are the sole property of ICS. No data will be shared with third parties except legal authorities (e.g., police, courts) when legally required.

All activity and communication within this app is subject to monitoring and recording by ICS administration.

report_warning: ⚠️ You are about to submit a formal report. All information provided, including attachments, will be reviewed and stored as official documentation. Submitting false or misleading information, or evidence that invades the privacy or misrepresents others, may result in disciplinary or legal action. By continuing, you acknowledge that your submission may be used in formal proceedings.
report_terms_required: You must read and accept the Terms of Use & Liability Disclaimer before submitting.
report_terms_content:
Terms of Use & Liability Disclaimer
Effective as of June 2025
By accessing and using the Report feature within this application, you agree to the following terms and conditions. These terms are binding and enforceable under applicable local and international laws.

1. Purpose and Intended Use
This feature is provided exclusively to facilitate the responsible reporting of genuine concerns involving students, staff, or parents affiliated with ICS. It is not to be used for personal grievances, speculative accusations, or retaliation of any kind.

2. Mandatory Submission of Evidence
All reports must be accompanied by verifiable supporting documentation or proof (e.g., screenshots, video, email, chat logs). Submissions lacking evidence may be automatically dismissed.

Frivolous, unfounded, or speculative reports—especially those submitted without due evidence—may result in administrative sanctions against the reporting party.

3. Legal and Disciplinary Consequences
By submitting a report through this system, you acknowledge and accept that:

The information and materials you provide may be used as evidence in official disciplinary or legal proceedings.

Any report found to contain false, misleading, defamatory, or malicious information may lead to disciplinary action, including, but not limited to, revocation of access rights, permanent account suspension, or referral to legal authorities.

Reports containing unlawful or privacy-violating material (e.g., unauthorized recordings or images of minors) may trigger legal liability on your part.

4. No Expectation of Anonymity or Immunity
While all reports will be handled with discretion, anonymity is not guaranteed. If a report leads to formal proceedings, your identity and submitted materials may be disclosed to relevant parties in accordance with due process.

Misuse of this system under the assumption of anonymity is a serious breach of trust and may result in immediate administrative and legal consequences.

5. Right of the Institution
ICS reserves the unconditional right to:

Investigate or disregard any report at its sole discretion;
Retain all submitted data for internal records;
Share submitted materials with law enforcement or legal counsel as required;
Pursue legal remedies in response to misuse of this feature.

6. Your Declaration
By using this feature, you declare that:

All information provided is accurate to the best of your knowledge;
You are acting in good faith and not with malicious intent;
You understand the potential consequences of your submission;
You agree to indemnify ICS and its affiliates from any damages resulting from your misuse of this system.

If you do not agree to these terms, do not submit a report using this feature.
